inputs.description: A Ladybug data collection object or a list of data collections.
inputs.name: _data

inputs.description:
Optional metadata to be associated with the Header. The input 
should be a list of text strings with a property name and value for
the property separated by a colon. For example:
_
.    source: TMY
.    city: New York
.    country: USA
_
If provided, it will replace the current metadata.
If not provided, the original metadata will be preserved.
inputs.name: _metadata_

description:
Set or override metadata for a Ladybug data collection.
-

outputs.description: The data collection with the metadata applied to it.
outputs.name: data

name: LB Apply Metadata
